title: Steel Dynamics shares rise on stronger-than-expected profit view
text: Steel Dynamics Inc. STLD, +1.45% said Thursday it expects second-quarter adjusted earnings of $6.61 to $6.65 a share, which excludes an impact of 28 cents a share for start-up costs of the steel maker's Sinton Texas mill investment. Including the cost, Steel Dynamics expects to earn $6.33 to $6.37 a share.
